policy.description: Every reproduced product regression becomes a permanent CI usage scenario. Manual device testing is reserved for new behavior that is not represented here yet.

scenarios.description: Install the APK, launch Elephant and reject crashes, ANRs, permission interruptions and blank renderer surfaces.
scenarios.regression: Android white screen and startup camera permission

scenarios.description: Open search, type a query and return to the workspace.
scenarios.regression: Broken mobile search lifecycle and missing search.initVault

scenarios.description: Open and close Settings through accessible controls.
scenarios.regression: Settings surface inaccessible or oversized on mobile

scenarios.description: Open the navigation drawer and verify that the vault tree is exposed.
scenarios.regression: Drawer compressed the note grid instead of overlaying it

scenarios.description: Switch the note library between grid and list layouts, then restore the original layout.
scenarios.regression: Mobile layout controls were present but did not update the library

scenarios.description: Open the mobile sort sheet and select title ordering.
scenarios.regression: Mobile sort control opened no usable sheet

scenarios.description: Expand the seeded Getting Started folder, open its Welcome note and validate the complete editor chrome.
scenarios.regression: The Android test tapped a folder instead of a note and the historical full-window editor hid normal note controls

scenarios.description: Open the navigation drawer and close it with the Android system back action.
scenarios.regression: The Android back action left the navigation overlay stuck above the workspace

scenarios.description: Open a seeded note and return to the note library with the Android back action.
scenarios.regression: Leaving the editor returned to a blank surface or terminated the application

scenarios.description: Send Elephant to the Android home screen and resume its existing process and workspace.
scenarios.regression: Resuming from the background recreated a white or unresponsive renderer

scenarios.description: Force-stop Elephant, launch it again and verify that the existing vault workspace is restored.
scenarios.regression: A cold relaunch lost the active vault or failed after the first successful launch

scenarios.description: Submit an impossible search query and verify that the search surface remains responsive and closable.
scenarios.regression: Zero-result searches froze the renderer or left the modal impossible to dismiss

scenarios.description: Open and close mobile search repeatedly while checking process and renderer health after every cycle.
scenarios.regression: Repeated search activation accumulated broken overlays or rejected promises

scenarios.description: Open Settings and return to the workspace using the Android system back action.
scenarios.regression: The Android back action could not escape Settings or exposed an empty workspace

scenarios.description: Open search, display the software keyboard, dismiss it and then close the search surface.
scenarios.regression: The keyboard hid controls or consumed the only action capable of closing search

scenarios.description: Cycle through drawer, Settings and search navigation several times without restarting Elephant.
scenarios.regression: Repeated cross-surface navigation eventually crashed or stranded the mobile shell
